folksonomy.title: Injhini ya Folksonomy
folksonomy.subtitle: Xihlovo xa swilotlelo
folksonomy.description: Folksonomy yi pfumelela vatirhisi ku engetela tithegi ta ntolovelo eka swikumiwa. Languta swilotlelo hinkwaswo leswi kumekaka laha hansi, lavisisa swilotlelo swo karhi kumbe u tikhoma eka xilotlelo xin’wana ni xin’wana leswaku u vona swilo leswi xi tirhisaka.
folksonomy.progress_bar: Usage frequency indicator: {percent}% relative to other keys

key_visualization_guide.title: Key Visualization Guide:
key_visualization_guide.badge_products_end: shows the number of products using this key
key_visualization_guide.badge_values_end: shows the number of unique values for this key
key_visualization_guide.progress_bar: The progress bar represents how commonly the key is used relative to other keys

folksonomy.no_keys_available: No Folksonomy keys available. Keys will appear here once they are created.
folksonomy.no_keys_found: No keys found with the current search query.

home.intro_1: Open Food Facts Explorer i xitirhisiwa xo lavisisa database ya Open Food Facts.
home.intro_2: U nga nghenisa khodi ya xiendliwa eka barhi yo lavisisa laha henhla ku sungula kutani u tikhoma eka xin’wana xa swikumiwa leswi nga laha hansi.

datasources.title: Swihlovo swa Data
datasources.also_checked_by: Tluka ra swikumiwa na rona ri kamberiwile hi
datasources.last_modified_t: Ku lulamisiwa ko hetelela ka tluka ra xiendliwa eka {date} hi
datasources.incomplete_or_incorrect: If the data is incomplete or incorrect, you can complete or correct it by editing this page.
datasources.check_be_first: Be the first to check this product

info.images: Layicha swifaniso leswi nga erivaleni swa xiendliwa, swiaki, na mintiyiso ya swakudya ku pfuna van’wana ku vona xitirhisiwa.
info.basic_info: Nyika vuxokoxoko lebyikulu mayelana na xiendliwa, kufana na nhlayo, ku pakiwa na muendli.
info.languages: Engetelani mavito ya swikumiwa na tinhlamuselo hi tindzimi to hambana ku endla leswaku xiendliwa xi fikeleleka eka vatirhisi vo tala.
info.ingredients: Tsala swilo hinkwaswo leswi nga kona eka xiendliwa. Leswi swi pfuna vatirhisi lava nga na ti allergies kumbe ku tsakela swakudya.
info.nutrition: Nghenisa mimpimo ya swakudya hi 100g/ml tani hileswi swikombisiweke eka xipaci. Leswi swi pfuna vatirhisi ku pimanisa swikumiwa.
info.moderator_tools: These tools are only available to moderators. They allow for administrative actions like correcting the product barcode.
info.prices: Help track this product's price history on Open Prices.
info.comment: Hi ku hlawula, engetela nhlamuselo ku hlamusela ku cinca ka wena kumbe ku nyika mongo lowu engetelekeke.
info.packaging: Describe each packaging component (bottle, cap, box, etc.) with its shape, material, and recycling instructions. You can add multiple components.

tooltips.serving_size: Nhlayo leyi yi pfuneta ku endla xibalo xa proportional xa swakudya swin’wana na swin’wana hi sayizi ya serving. Xikombiso, 60 g, 60g kumbe 60 G (ku tsakela yosungula), 1000 ml kumbe 1L
tooltips.ingredients_list: Keep the original order. Indicate the percentage when specified. Separate with a comma or hyphen and use parentheses for ingredients of an ingredient.
tooltips.categories: Kombisa ntsena xiyenge lexi kongomeke swinene. Swiyenge swa vatswari swi ta engeteriwa hi ku tisungulela. Xikombiso, ‘Sardines eka mafurha ya olive’, ‘Juzi ya orange kusuka eka concentrate’.
tooltips.product_name: Vito ra xiendliwa i vito lerikulu leri kandziyisiweke eka xipaci. Swi nga va mfungho wa bindzu lowu tsarisiweke. Xikombiso, ‘Nesquik’, ‘Tomato Ketchup’. U nga katsi brand eka vito
tooltips.brand_name: Nghenisa ti brand hinkwato ta xitirhisiwa. Brand leyikulu, hi xitalo yi kombisiwa kahle eka phasela rale mahlweni, yifanele ku nghenisiwa kusungula. Xikombiso, 'Nutella, 'Oreo, Mondelez'.
tooltips.quantity: Kopa ntikelo lowu kombisiweke eka xiendliwa naswona u nga rivali tiyuniti. Xikombiso, 230g, 6(eka 6 wa matandza), 3 x 150g (eka xiendliwa lexinga na 3 wa mabokisi, rin’wana na rin’wana ra 150g).
tooltips.labels: Xihlawulekisi xin’wana na xin’wana xa xiendliwa **lexi nga xa ntiyiso** naswona xi hambaneke na tinsimu tin’wana. Xikombiso, 'Nutri-Score, NOVA…', 'Yi endliwile e Belgium, yi humelerisiwile e Brittany…', 'ISO 9001, ISO 22000…'.
tooltips.stores: Nghenisa xitolo lexi u xaveke xitirhisiwa lexi eka xona. Xikombiso, ‘Carrefour’, ‘Walmart’, ‘Lidl’.
tooltips.origins: Engeta swikombiso swihi na swihi swa masungulo leswi unga swikumaka eka xipaci. A wu fanelanga u vilela hi masungulo lama kombisiweke hi ku kongoma eka nxaxamelo wa swiaki. Xikombiso, ‘Nyama ya homu kusuka e Argentina’, ‘Soy ayi humi eka European Union’.
tooltips.traceability_code: Eka xiyenge lexi, u nga nghenisa tikhodi leti fambelanaka na swikombiso swa ku paka, swikombiso swa vutivi kumbe swikombiso swa rihanyo.
tooltips.countries: Matiko lawa xiendliwa lexi xi kumekaka ngopfu (ku nga katsiwi switolo leswi hlawulekeke eka switirhisiwa swa matiko mambe).
tooltips.product_type: Select the type of product: Food, Beauty, Pet Food, or Other.
tooltips.empty_fiber: Enter a hyphen (-) if the value is not present on the packaging.
tooltips.allergens: List the allergens present in the product (e.g. Milk, Gluten, Eggs).
tooltips.traces: List any traces of allergens that may be present due to cross-contamination (e.g. Nuts, Soy).

edit.nutrition_issues_description: We have detected some potential issues with the nutritional information you provided. Please review the following warnings and make any necessary corrections before saving your changes.
edit.search_languages: Lavisisa tindzimi leti u nga ta ti engetela
edit.name: Name

packaging_component.quantity_per_unit_label: Quantity of product contained per unit
packaging_component.all_listed: All packaging components have been listed
packaging_component.number_of_units_desc: Enter the number of packaging units of the same shape and material contained in the product.
packaging_component.shape_desc: Enter the shape name listed in the recycling instructions if they are available, or select a shape.
packaging_component.material_desc: Enter the specific material if it can be determined (a material code inside a triangle can often be found on packaging parts), or a generic material (for instance plastic or metal) if you are unsure.
packaging_component.recycling_desc: Enter recycling instructions only if they are listed on the product.
packaging_component.weight_measured_desc: Remove any remaining food and wash and dry the packaging part before weighting. If possible, use a scale with 0.1g or 0.01g precision.
packaging_component.quantity_per_unit_desc: Enter the net weight or net volume and indicate the unit (for example g or ml).
packaging_component.recycling_instructions_desc: Write here the packaging information and/or the recycling instructions that are present on the product.
packaging_component.recycling_instructions_list: List all packaging parts separated by a comma or line feed, with their amount (e.g. 1 or 6) type (e.g. bottle, box, can), material (e.g. plastic, metal, aluminium) and if available their size (e.g. 33cl) and recycling instructions.
packaging_component.recycling_instructions_specificity: Try to be as specific as possible. For plastic, please indicate if it is opaque or transparent, colored, PET or PEHD.
packaging_component.recycling_instructions_combination: Data from this field will be combined with any data provided for each packaging part. It is possible to provide one or the other, or both.
packaging_component.recycling_instructions_examples: 1 plastic film to discard, 1 FSC carboard box to recycle, 6 1.5L transparent PET plastic bottles to recycle, 6 colored opaque plastic caps, 12 33cl aluminium cans
packaging_component.packaging_photo_desc: Photos of the packaging info and recycling instructions help to verify the data.
packaging_component.multiple_uploads_guidance: With Chrome, Firefox and Safari, you can select multiple pictures (product, ingredients, nutrition facts etc.) by clicking them while holding the Ctrl key pressed to add them all in one shot.

edit.origins: Origin of the product and/or its ingredients
edit.product_page_url: Link to the product page on the official site of the producer

missing_number.title: Serving size is missing a number
missing_number.desc: Serving size should include a numeric value. Examples: {examples}

missing_unit.title: Serving size is missing a unit
missing_unit.desc: Serving size should include a unit. Examples: {examples}

unknown_unit.title: Serving size unit may be incorrect
unknown_unit.desc: Serving size should include a common unit. Examples: {examples}

edit.no_nutrition_specified: Ku hava datha ya swakudya leyi boxiweke

edit.legal_warning_photos_2: Upload ntsena swifaniso swa wena kumbe leswi u nga na mpfumelelo lowu nga erivaleni wo swi tirhisa.

network.title: Xihoxo xa Nhlanganiso
network.message: Ku tsandzekile ku hlanganisa na sevha ya Open Food Facts. Hi kombela u languta vuhlanganisi bya wena bya inthanete ivi u ringeta nakambe.
network.instructions: Loko xiphiqo xi nga heli, endzela Tluka ra Xiyimo xa Tinhla ta Swakudya leti Pfulekeke.

landing.title: Vula Mukambisisi wa Tinhla ta Swakudya
landing.subtitle: Dathabeyisi ya ntirhisano, ya mahala na leyi pfulekeke ya switirhisiwa swa swakudya kusuka emisaveni hinkwayo. Kuma, lavisisa, na ku hoxa xandla eka ku va swakudya swi va erivaleni eka un’wana na un’wana.
landing.explore_products_desc: Languta timiliyoni ta swilo leswi endliweke hi swakudya, vona mintiyiso ya swakudya naswona u endla swiboho leswi nga ni vutivi.
landing.help_improve_desc: Help us improve Open Food Facts by editing or answering questions about these products.

dashboard.html_title: Profayile ya Mutirhisi - {user} - Pfula Xihlohloteri xa Tinhla ta Swakudya
dashboard.title: Xivumbeko xa Mutirhisi xa {user}

explore.title: Kambisisa Tinhla Ta Swakudya Leti Pfulekeke
explore.subtitle: Kuma switirhisiwa leswi nga eka fexeni, swiyenge leswi dumeke, naswona hoxa xandla eka ku va swakudya swi va erivaleni!
explore.trending_products_desc: Vona leswaku hi swihi swilo leswi langutiwaka ni ku hleriwa ngopfu sweswi.
explore.popular_categories_desc: Languta swiyenge swa swakudya leswi dumeke swinene eka database ya hina.
explore.recently_added_desc: Languta switirhisiwa swa sweswinyana leswi engeteriweke hi vaaki.
explore.contribute_now_desc: Pfuna ku antswisa Tinhla ta Swakudya leswi Pfulekeke hi ku engetela kumbe ku hlela swikumiwa, kumbe ku hlamula swivutiso.
explore.random_product_desc: U titwa u ri ni nkateko? Kuma xitirhisiwa lexi nga hlelekangiki ku suka eka database ya hina.
explore.learn_more_desc: Kuma ndlela leyi Open Food Facts yi tirhaka ha yona na ndlela leyi u nga pfunaka ha yona.
